payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Partial tan upholstered chair visible at the lower-right edge of the crop, showing the seat cushion and part of the back which is draped with a patterned fabric; a dark wooden leg is visible and the chair is edge-cropped and appears to be about 1.0 m from the camera.
